description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white with dark accent walls and large glass windows, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property features a spacious green lawn, a paved driveway, and a small swimming pool in the backyard. A row of trees lines one side of the lot, providing privacy and a natural border. The main entrance is accessible via a short walkway from the street, and the house is surrounded by a low boundary wall. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and a landscaped yard bordered by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a row of trees along the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lawn, pool area, and the full row of trees in front of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and the house's flat roof and open layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, entrance, and the boundary wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main door with a short walkway, no porch, and a clean, unadorned facade
